_meta.source: Howard MD sprint brief (reviewer's ordinance read) + general US zoning conventions
user_action_required: Spot-check at least 10 rows marked tier=brief_verified
Once verified, set human_reviewed=TRUE per row

tier_meanings.brief_verified: Reviewer's brief explicitly verified this verdict against ordinance text. Default confidence 0.95.
tier_meanings.brief_likely: Reviewer's brief said 'likely X' (no explicit verification). Default confidence 0.70.
tier_meanings.convention: Inferred from US zoning conventions (e.g. residential zones never permit self-storage). Default confidence 0.85.
tier_meanings.requires_ordinance_read: Brief explicitly said 'needs ordinance read'. Verdict is a placeholder. Default confidence 0.40.

rows.cited_subsection: §131.0 Conditional Uses (B-2 self-storage rule)
rows.notes: Conditional Use granted in B-2 for self-storage iff lot >= 5 ac AND within planned service area for public water + public sewer. Buy-box should hard-filter B-2 parcels < 5ac (treat as prohibited).

rows.cited_subsection: §122.0 M-1 Manufacturing Light - permitted uses
rows.notes: Brief: 'likely PERMITTED — verify §122'. Self-storage / mini-warehouse typically permitted by-right in light-industrial districts. Spot-check §122.0 use list.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - M-2 Manufacturing Heavy permitted uses
rows.notes: Brief: 'likely PERMITTED — verify ordinance'. Heavy-industrial almost always permits self-storage by-right. Spot-check.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - CAC w/ CLI overlay
rows.notes: Corridor Activity Center + Continuing Light Industrial overlay. Brief: 'likely permitted (light industrial overlay)'. Base CAC may be conditional; CLI overlay typically restores light-industrial permitted-by-right uses.

Brief: 'needs ordinance read — likely prohibited or conditional'. B-1 (Local Business) typically caps lot size + use intensity, so self-storage is often excluded. Default to prohibited pending verification.
Business Rural. Brief: 'needs ordinance read'. Rural-business zones occasionally permit self-storage as accessory; default prohibited pending verification.
Shopping Center. Brief: 'likely prohibited or conditional'. SC zones usually restrict to retail/service; self-storage rarely listed.
Planned Office Research. Brief: 'needs ordinance read'. Office/research zones almost always prohibit storage; default prohibited.
Planned Employment Center. Brief: 'needs ordinance read'. PEC sometimes permits warehouse/storage as employment-supporting; default conditional pending verification.

New Town (Columbia). Brief: 'needs ordinance read — complex'. NT districts have area-specific use lists. Existing matrix has 'N T' at 0.80 confidence (human=true, conditional) — defer to that until ordinance read.
Mixed Use. Brief: 'needs ordinance read'. MXD zones sometimes permit storage as part of mixed-use program.
Transit Oriented Development. Brief: 'needs ordinance read'. TOD zones almost universally prohibit auto-oriented uses like self-storage to maximize transit ridership; default prohibited.
Community Center Transition. Brief: 'needs ordinance read'. Transitional zones usually restrict to medium-intensity commercial; default prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - CC Convenience Center
rows.notes: Convenience Center. Brief: 'likely prohibited'. CC = small neighborhood-scale retail; self-storage not a convenience use.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - HO Historic Office
rows.notes: Historic Office. Brief: 'likely prohibited'. Historic-preservation overlay zones never permit auto-oriented commercial.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - PSC Planned Senior Community
rows.notes: Planned Senior Community. Brief: 'likely prohibited'. Senior-housing PDs prohibit non-residential commercial uses.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - PGCC Planned Golf Course Community
rows.notes: Planned Golf Course Community. Brief: 'likely prohibited'. Golf-course PDs are residential-with-amenity, no commercial storage.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-ED Residential Environmental Development
rows.notes: Residential. Self-storage never permitted in US residential districts. Convention-based.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-20 Single 20,000 SF
rows.notes: Residential single-family. Self-storage prohibited. Convention.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-12 Single 12,000 SF
rows.notes: Residential single-family. Self-storage prohibited. Convention.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - RSI Senior-Institutional
rows.notes: Senior-Institutional residential. Self-storage prohibited. Convention.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-SC Single Cluster
rows.notes: Residential single cluster. Self-storage prohibited. Convention.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-SC + Institutional overlay
rows.notes: Residential single cluster with Institutional Overlay. Overlay adds schools/churches but doesn't introduce storage. Base R-SC prohibits self-storage.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-SA-8 Single Attached
rows.notes: Residential single attached (townhomes). Self-storage prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-SA-8 + Institutional overlay
rows.notes: Residential single attached + Institutional Overlay. Self-storage prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-VH Village Housing
rows.notes: Village Housing residential. Self-storage prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-A-15 Apartments
rows.notes: Apartment residential. Self-storage prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-MH Mobile Homes
rows.notes: Mobile Home residential. Self-storage prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - RC w/ Density Exchange Option overlay
rows.notes: Rural Conservation + Density Exchange Option. Conservation/rural-residential base, no self-storage. DEO is a density-transfer mechanism, doesn't add storage uses.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - RR w/ Density Exchange Option overlay
rows.notes: Rural Residential + Density Exchange Option. Rural residential, no self-storage.
Solid Waste Overlay. Brief: 'overlay — handle separately'. SW restricts to landfill/transfer-station use. Self-storage almost certainly prohibited within SW overlay. Verify.
